## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential partnership between GrowthX and Napa for AI-enabled content creation and social media management.](https://fathom.video/share/dZJP9yo9ffqZm38YnUnKH7TKkZpLqUTs?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX wants to offer Napa's social media content services to their clients, starting with a pilot for 3 accounts](https://fathom.video/share/dZJP9yo9ffqZm38YnUnKH7TKkZpLqUTs?tab=summary&timestamp=707.0)
  - [Napa to provide 12 sample posts for $1,500, with potential for ongoing $4,000/month engagement](https://fathom.video/share/dZJP9yo9ffqZm38YnUnKH7TKkZpLqUTs?tab=summary&timestamp=1641.0)
  - [Both companies see synergies in their AI-driven content creation approaches for SEO and social media](https://fathom.video/share/dZJP9yo9ffqZm38YnUnKH7TKkZpLqUTs?tab=summary&timestamp=948.0)
  - [Agreement to explore how GrowthX's AI expertise could enhance Napa's content creation process](https://fathom.video/share/dZJP9yo9ffqZm38YnUnKH7TKkZpLqUTs?tab=summary&timestamp=1693.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Business Model and Services

  - [Blend of experts and AI in a growth agency format](https://fathom.video/share/dZJP9yo9ffqZm38YnUnKH7TKkZpLqUTs?tab=summary&timestamp=189.0)
  - [Primary focus on content marketing and SEO](https://fathom.video/share/dZJP9yo9ffqZm38YnUnKH7TKkZpLqUTs?tab=summary&timestamp=202.0)
  - [Clients pay for outcomes, receiving 5-10x more content than traditional methods](https://fathom.video/share/dZJP9yo9ffqZm38YnUnKH7TKkZpLqUTs?tab=summary&timestamp=218.0)
  - [Use of AI workflows allows scaling of expert time across multiple clients](https://fathom.video/share/dZJP9yo9ffqZm38YnUnKH7TKkZpLqUTs?tab=summary&timestamp=1034.0)
  - [Long-term vision to build "cursor for knowledge work"](https://fathom.video/share/dZJP9yo9ffqZm38YnUnKH7TKkZpLqUTs?tab=summary&timestamp=232.0)

### Napa's Content Creation Process

  - [Human-centric approach with writers using AI tools](https://fathom.video/share/dZJP9yo9ffqZm38YnUnKH7TKkZpLqUTs?tab=summary&timestamp=325.0)
  - [Customized content creation based on client preferences and target audience](https://fathom.video/share/dZJP9yo9ffqZm38YnUnKH7TKkZpLqUTs?tab=summary&timestamp=1101.0)
  - [Variety of post types from memes to technical content](https://fathom.video/share/dZJP9yo9ffqZm38YnUnKH7TKkZpLqUTs?tab=summary&timestamp=1533.0)
  - [Use of Slack for client communication and Notion for content queuing](https://fathom.video/share/dZJP9yo9ffqZm38YnUnKH7TKkZpLqUTs?tab=summary&timestamp=1467.0)
  - [Assembly used for scheduling posts](https://fathom.video/share/dZJP9yo9ffqZm38YnUnKH7TKkZpLqUTs?tab=summary&timestamp=1502.0)

### Potential Partnership Structure

  - [GrowthX to use Napa's services for their founder (Marcel), Jason, and client (Thiago)](https://fathom.video/share/dZJP9yo9ffqZm38YnUnKH7TKkZpLqUTs?tab=summary&timestamp=1364.0)
  - [Pilot: 12 posts (6 for Thiago, 3 each for Marcel and Jason) for $1,500](https://fathom.video/share/dZJP9yo9ffqZm38YnUnKH7TKkZpLqUTs?tab=summary&timestamp=1603.0)
  - [If successful, potential ongoing engagement at $4,000/month](https://fathom.video/share/dZJP9yo9ffqZm38YnUnKH7TKkZpLqUTs?tab=summary&timestamp=1650.0)
  - [Exploration of integrating GrowthX's AI expertise into Napa's processes](https://fathom.video/share/dZJP9yo9ffqZm38YnUnKH7TKkZpLqUTs?tab=summary&timestamp=1693.0)

### SEO and AI Content Creation

  - [Discussion on LLM impact on SEO and content citations](https://fathom.video/share/dZJP9yo9ffqZm38YnUnKH7TKkZpLqUTs?tab=summary&timestamp=421.0)
  - [GrowthX's sophisticated AI-driven content creation process for SEO](https://fathom.video/share/dZJP9yo9ffqZm38YnUnKH7TKkZpLqUTs?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [Potential for applying similar AI processes to social media content creation](https://fathom.video/share/dZJP9yo9ffqZm38YnUnKH7TKkZpLqUTs?tab=summary&timestamp=1693.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Kevin to send onboarding questionnaire to Jason](https://fathom.video/share/dZJP9yo9ffqZm38YnUnKH7TKkZpLqUTs?tab=summary&timestamp=1722.0)
  - [Jason to provide answers by the weekend](https://fathom.video/share/dZJP9yo9ffqZm38YnUnKH7TKkZpLqUTs?tab=summary&timestamp=1774.0)
  - [Napa to deliver sample content by end of next week](https://fathom.video/share/dZJP9yo9ffqZm38YnUnKH7TKkZpLqUTs?tab=summary&timestamp=1725.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up call to review content and discuss next steps](https://fathom.video/share/dZJP9yo9ffqZm38YnUnKH7TKkZpLqUTs?tab=summary&timestamp=1734.0)
  - [Explore integration of GrowthX's AI expertise into Napa's content creation process](https://fathom.video/share/dZJP9yo9ffqZm38YnUnKH7TKkZpLqUTs?tab=summary&timestamp=1693.0)
